title: EvidenceRecord
description: Quality assessment or judgment linked to artifacts and candidates. All key conclusions must be traceable to evidence.

claim.description: The assertion this evidence supports (e.g., 'structure is high quality')

evidence_type.description: Whether this is backed by computation/experiment or is speculative

raw_metrics.description: Raw numerical results (pLDDT, RMSD, binding energy, etc.)

confidence.description: Confidence in the claim (0 = no confidence, 1 = certain)

reason_text.description: Human-readable explanation of the evidence and reasoning

linked_artifacts.description: Artifact IDs that produced this evidence

pass.description: Whether this evidence meets the acceptance threshold (null if no threshold)
